title: Shareholder Letters - BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY INC.
text: | **For shareholders and others who are interested, a book that compiles the full unedited versions of each of Warren Buffett�s letters to shareholders between 1965 and 2024 is available for sale at [this link](https://shop.ingramspark.com/b/084?params=RWMLgPMF5zpy6nosCqjAEDrnEGv4uQf6GDilKrIVWXt) .** |
